title: epipactis leptochila var. cleistogama
intro: Epipactis leptochila var. cleistogama, also known as the cleistogamous Helleborine, is a rare and unusual orchid species that produces self-pollinating flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epipactis leptochila var. cleistogama are thought to include the reduction of inflammation and the treatment of various infections, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
